name: smeta-ai
description: Smeta AI — qurilish smetalarini AI yordamida hisoblovchi SaaS platforma

scripts.build: npm run build -w @smeta/shared && npm run build -w @smeta/api && npm run build -w @smeta/web && npm run build -w @smeta/admin
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build -w @smeta/shared && npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
